university_affiliation: St. Peter’s Institute of Higher Education and Research (Deemed to be University), Chennai. UGC & AICTE Approved, NAAC A+ Accredited.
about: Davinci Media College is a studio-integrated training institution. We offer University-recognized degrees through our partnership with St. Peter's University, combining academic excellence with 85% hands-on studio training.
key_highlights: Degrees awarded by St. Peter’s University (Deemed to be University)
Training conducted inside 'Digital Magic' - a functional VFX & Animation studio
First college in India with an exclusive Motion Capture Studio
AI-Integrated Curriculum for Filmmaking, VFX, and Game Design
Global standards through partnership with Vanarts, Vancouver
Placement network including Prime Focus, Reliance Animation, and Technicolor

programs: Degree Path Diploma (Start degree training immediately after 10th)
Professional Certificate in Movie Color Grading (DI)

chennai.address: Devan Towers, 304, Arcot Road, Vadapalani, Chennai - 600026
